message:
fix(node): chain_anchor_hash for push_bounded audit ledgers + length-prefix hash hardening

7 files: add chain_anchor_hash field to preserve hash-chain integrity when
push_bounded evicts oldest audit entries (challenge_flow, certification,
ecosystem_registry, marker_stream, impossible_default, reputation).

4 sites: add length-prefix on variable-length fields before hashing to prevent
hash collision attacks (mitigation_synthesis, proof_carrying_decode x2,
provenance). Updated 3 test recomputation sites to match.

7507 tests pass, 0 failures.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
